subject: [PATCH v7 14/20] nfsd: send basic file attributes in CB_NOTIFY

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch adds the ability to send basic inode information in a CB_NOTIFY event, including attributes that can be acquired via GETATTR. The patch modifies the nfsd4_setup_notify_entry4 function to include inode attributes and encode them in the xdr stream. This allows clients to receive updated file attributes when notified of changes to files.
